# io.github.seanchatmangpt.jotp.observability.BaselinePerformanceTest


Baseline performance measurement for Proc.tell() without observability

This establishes the zero-overhead baseline for hot path comparison

Measuring Proc.tell() latency with observability infrastructure active

Framework event bus and metrics are enabled to simulate production load

Comparative analysis: baseline vs observability-enabled performance

This validates the zero-overhead principle for async event bus design
